subject: GitHub Copilot cloud agent

minimum_stronger_source_needed: One public vulnerability/advisory, incident writeup, or official remediation notice tied to Copilot cloud-agent MCP, allowlist, package-registry, or browser-download trust boundaries.
paper_thesis_use_now: Use as a machine-readable frontier candidate for the security zero-state queue and for methods text about what stronger public evidence would be needed before promotion.

subject: LangChain LLMMathChain allowed prompt injection into Python exec, creating arbitrary code execution risk / LlamaIndex safe_eval command injection enabled LLM-generated code to execute OS commands on the host
minimum_stronger_source_needed: One peer-reviewed paper, workshop paper, or conference-grade technical case writeup with incident-specific discussion that maps directly to CVE-2023-29374 or CVE-2024-3271.
paper_thesis_use_now: Best current frontier for turning thin independent-lab support into a reviewer-safe scholarly-evidence paragraph or appendix ladder.
decision_note: Best current scholarly attach route because existing rows already have the strongest non-vendor independence layer; one incident-specific workshop/conference/paper would change authority balance without adding a weak new row. Local near-miss scholarly screens: SEC-SCH-001, SEC-SCH-002.

subject: Claude Code default allowlist enabled unauthorized file read and network exfiltration before forced update
minimum_stronger_source_needed: One citable public technical case analysis, conference paper, or workshop paper discussing the unauthorized file-read/network-exfiltration flaw with enough specificity to map to CVE-2025-55284.
paper_thesis_use_now: Would strengthen the article's approval-model/control-failure story without changing the seeded row set.
decision_note: Claude Code is publication-important, but the bounded local scan found no incident-specific scholarly lead beyond generic internal references. No local near-miss scholarly screen currently maps cleanly enough to use as row support.

subject: LangChain broad load() allowlists enabled attacker-controlled object revival, chat-history poisoning, and possible credential or request side effects
minimum_stronger_source_needed: One peer-reviewed or conference-grade technical treatment of unsafe deserialization, runtime memory contamination, or attacker-controlled state revival tied directly to CVE-2026-44843 or the same vulnerable LangChain runtime path.
paper_thesis_use_now: Useful for a security-shape diversity paragraph, methods note, or limitations-to-upgrade ladder in the thesis chapter.
decision_note: Memory/state row offers a stronger mechanism-diversity payoff than Claude Code or Langflow, but no local near-miss scholarly source is already attached. Local near-miss scholarly screens: SEC-SCH-002.

subject: Langflow custom_component endpoint allows public candidate record for remote code execution risk
minimum_stronger_source_needed: One public scholarly or conference-grade technical case analysis tied directly to CVE-2024-37014 or the custom_component RCE path, plus preferably a direct vendor remediation statement on the existing official surfaces.
